title: Add per-write bead auto-commit in storage
description: Update RepositoryStorage write flow to detect bead creation vs update, serialize git operations with a lock, and best-effort stage and commit the written bead file from _write_bead without surfacing git failures.
acceptance_criteria: RepositoryStorage defines a private git commit helper for a single bead write and keeps git failures non-fatal.
_write_bead captures whether the bead file existed before the atomic replace and uses that state to choose created vs status commit messages.
Concurrent callers share a lock that serializes git add/git commit operations without changing the existing atomic file write behavior.
Commit messages use `[bead] <bead_id>: created (<agent_type>)` for first write and `[bead] <bead_id>: <status>` for later writes.
